and Pisces the fourth. At a time you can consider only those
Rasis that constitute one group of trines. Now remember the
following four rules for the correction of the number of benefic
dots appearing in a group of trines : (1) When all the three
signs of a group have benefic dots, if one contains the least num-
ber. that should he adopted in the other two too. (2) If one
of the houses is devoid of dots, no correction is necessary
(3) If two houses are vacant, make the third also vacant. (4) If

AST4KAVARGA 275
all the three houses contain an equal number ol henefic dots,
put zero in all the three places. Now let us apply these rules to
the Sun's A.V. (Astakavarga) chart. Take the first group of
Irincs. In one there are 3 dots and is the other two 5 each. So
use the Rule 1 and put 3 dots in all the three Rasis. The same
rale applies to the second group too. There too the least
number is 3. So put this 3 in all the three Rasis. In the third
